sourcesContent:
<template>
    <svg class="circle-behind no-pointer-events" viewBox="0 0 37.894 37.894" :style="rankingStyle">
        <circle class="negative all-pointer-events" @click="vote(false)"/>
        <circle class="positive all-pointer-events" @click="vote(true)"/>
        <path :d="mdiThumbDown" class="negative-icon"/>
        <path :d="mdiThumbUp" class="positive-icon"/>
        <circle class="segment neutral"/>
        <circle class="segment negative"/>
        <circle class="segment positive"/>
    </svg>
</template>

<script>
import { mdiThumbUp, mdiThumbDown } from '@quasar/extras/mdi-v5'
import { ref, watch, onMounted } from 'vue'

export default {
    name: 'KvarCircleRanking',
    props: {
        visible      : { type: Boolean, default: true },
        voted        : { type: String , default: undefined },
        positiveVotes: { type: Number , default: 0    },
        negativeVotes: { type: Number , default: 0    },
        color        : { type: String , default: ""   }
    },
    setup(props, { emit }) {
        const rankingStyle    = ref({})
        const backgroundColor = ref(props.color)


        const updateRankingStyle = () => {
            rankingStyle.value['--r']       = props.visible?'15%':'0%'
            rankingStyle.value['--bgColor'] = backgroundColor.value
        }

        const updateVotesStyle = () => {
            const positive = props.positiveVotes || 0
            const negative = props.negativeVotes || 0
            const sum = positive + negative
            const perimeter = sum ? (Math.max( 0 , Math.min( sum, 100 ) ) / sum) : 0 
            const positivePercentage = parseInt(Math.round(positive * perimeter))
            const negativePercentage = parseInt(Math.round(negative * perimeter))
            rankingStyle.value = {
                '--positive': `${positivePercentage} ${100-positivePercentage}`,
                '--negative': `0 ${100-negativePercentage} ${negativePercentage} 0`,
                '--r'       : props.visible?'15%':'0%'
            }
        }
/*
        const rankingTransforms = {
            title       : { height: 220, width: 320, x: 40 , y: 80  },
            status      : { height: 80 , width: 240, x: 80 , y: 292 }, 
            confirmTitle: { height: 60 , width: 60 , x: 170, y: 300, overflow: 'visible' },
            fontSizes   : { min: 14, max: 40, current: 40 }
        }
*/
        watch([()=>props.visible, ()=>props.color, ()=>props.voted], updateRankingStyle)
        watch([()=>props.positiveVotes, ()=>props.negativeVotes], updateVotesStyle)

        onMounted(() => {
            updateRankingStyle()
            updateVotesStyle()
        } )

        const vote = value => {
            if(value)
                emit('update:positiveVotes', props.positiveVotes+1 )
            else
                emit('update:negativeVotes', props.negativeVotes+1 )
        }

        return {
            rankingStyle,
            vote,
            mdiThumbUp, mdiThumbDown
        }
    }
}
</script>

<style>
    .circle-behind {
        --r: 15%;
        position: absolute;
        overflow: hidden;
        border-radius: 50%;
        margin: -10%;
    }
    .circle-behind circle {
        r: var(--r);
        stroke-width: 0;
        transition: r 0.2s ease-in-out, filter 0.2s ease-in-out, fill 0.2s ease-in-out;
        fill: var(--bgColor);
    }
    .circle-behind circle:hover {
        r: 18%;
        cursor: pointer;
        filter: brightness(0.9);
        position: relative;
    }
    .circle-behind circle:active {
        r: 100%;
        filter: brightness(1.1);
    }
    .circle-behind circle.positive:active  {
        fill:#63d682;
    }
    .circle-behind circle.negative:active  {
        fill:rgb(224, 128, 128);
    }
    .circle-behind .positive {
        cy: 20%;
        cx: 80%;
        stroke:#63d682;
        stroke-dasharray: var(--positive);
    }
    .circle-behind .negative {
        cy: 20%;
        cx: 20%;
        stroke: rgb(224, 128, 128);
        stroke-dasharray: var(--negative);
    }
    .circle-behind .positive-icon, .circle-behind .negative-icon {
        fill: white;
        transform: translate(-80.25%, 14.75%) scale(0.075);
    }
    .circle-behind .negative-icon {
        transform: translate(-15.25%, 15.25%) scale(0.075);
    }
    .circle-behind .segment {
        fill: none;
        cy: 50%;
        cx: 50%;
        r: 42%;
        stroke-width: 2%;
        stroke-dashoffset: 25;

        transition: stroke-dasharray 0.2s ease-in-out;
    }
    .circle-behind .neutral {
        stroke: rgb(0, 0, 0);
        stroke-width: 1.5%;
        opacity: 0.15;
    }
    /
    .circle {
        position: relative;
        z-index: 4000;

        overflow: hidden;
        border-radius: 50%;
        border: solid var(--borderWidth) var(--q-primary);
        box-shadow: 0 8px 12px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3), 0 4px 40px 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);

        transform: scale( var(--scale) );
        transition: transform 0.2s ease-in-out, border 0.2s ease-in-out;
    }
    .circle circle {
        fill: var(--bgColor);
        r: 50%;
        cx: 50%;
        cy: 50%;
    }
    .circle .status-circle {
        fill: var(--statusBgColor);
        cy: 121%;
    }
    .circle text {
        unicode-bidi: unset !important;
        pointer-events: none;
        fill: var(--textColor);
    }
    #d3plus-textBox-title, #d3plus-textBox-status {
        display: var(--titleDisplayMode);
    }

    .click-outside {
        position: fixed;
        top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; bottom: 0;
        background-color: rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
        background: radial-gradient(circle at center, rgba(0,0,0,0.1) 25%, rgba(0,0,0,0.6) 90%);
        z-index: 3000;
    }
</style>
